subcommands.description: Update Rust toolchains and rustup

name: --no-self-update
options.description: Don't perform self update when running the rustup update command

options.description: Force an update, even if some components are missing

options.description: Install toolchains that require an emulator

subcommands.description: Set the default toolchain

subcommands.description: Modify or query the installed toolchains

subcommands.description: Install or update a given toolchain

name: --allow-downgrade
options.description: Allow rustup to downgrade the toolchain to satisfy your component choice

name: --force-non-host
options.description: Install toolchains that require an emulator

subcommands.description: List installed toolchains

subcommands.description: Create a custom toolchain by symlinking to a directory

subcommands.description: List installed and available targets

options.description: Remove override toolchains for all nonexistent directories

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List directory toolchain overrides

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: Run a command with an environment configured for a given toolchain

options.description: Install the requested toolchain if needed
